name: openoutreach_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the openoutreach capability.

prompts.name: lead_finding_prompt
prompts.template: Find LinkedIn leads interested in {product_description} targeted to {target_market}.
prompts.use_case: Sales teams automating lead prospecting on LinkedIn.

prompts.name: outreach_message_template
prompts.template: Hi {lead_name}, I thought you might be interested in {product_name} because {personalization_reason}.
prompts.use_case: Marketers scaling outreach with personalized messaging.
